title: A couple angelic questions
wikitext:
[]: A couple angelic questions             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Jun 24, 2007 9:13 pm Just a few things I probably forgot the details behind or something; why do Angels' DNA match human's 99% or so? They both come from different seeds of life; why would they correlate? And why would Rei-Lilith have a type blue blood pattern, again?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Jun 24, 2007 9:28 pm Just to drive home that we are fundimentaly the same creatures, even if we can't coexsist.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jun 24, 2007 9:55 pm I think it's made fairly clear that the angels are indeed human. The classified information stated that both Adam and Lilith were seeds from the First Ancestral Race. The conflict arose when one Earth got two seeds.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Mon Jun 25, 2007 10:31 am We're fundamentally the same, yes, but we're different, in apperance and in blood pattern. Why is this, if Adam and Lilith are pretty well the same thing?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Jun 25, 2007 11:37 am This is something that confuses me to no end, and I think we can chalk it up to just silly SF metabiology. Adam and Lilith = two fundamentaly different beings who give birth to their respective races in two COMPLETELY different ways. Lilith = LCL from her body which life arises from in some SF version of Evolution. Adam = Mother Hen who lays eggs in which her species arises from many years after their actual "birth". Lilim made from LCL, Angels made from PWM. Yet we're supposed to believe that these two species, who look completely different, have completely different parents, and are born completely different are essentially the same thing? LOLWTF?!!! I guess by these standards they could propose that chickens and humans are the same thing. It doesn't have to make sense, it's just SF!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jun 25, 2007 1:45 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: Yet we're supposed to believe that these two species, who look completely different, have completely different parents, and are born completely different are essentially the same thing?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Jun 25, 2007 2:24 pm Reichu wrote: Heard of the FAR's Mysterious Evolutionary Predestination Technology (TM)? When you Have The Technology, even primordial slime can be guided by the hand of convergent evolution into a ridiculous species with unbelievable resemblances to various other preexisting entities termed "human". At least we don't look too too different. (Those who have undergone ATF-aided transmogrification are not reliable means of comparison.)

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Mon Jun 25, 2007 4:20 pm Didn't someone venture to posit the idea that maybe the Spears that Seeds are provided with play some crucial role in the process of creating life on a planet, and that, since she seems to have lost hers in the crash-landing on Earth, Lilith may, out of necessity, have had to improvise the "evolution from primordial soup" option?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Jun 25, 2007 4:49 pm Shin-seiki wrote: Didn't someone venture to posit the idea that maybe the Spears that Seeds are provided with play some crucial role in the process of creating life on a planet, and that, since she seems to have lost hers in the crash-landing on Earth, Lilith may, out of necessity, have had to improvise the "evolution from primordial soup" option?

[]:             Quote Post by V » Mon Jun 25, 2007 5:13 pm Heard of the FAR's Mysterious Evolutionary Predestination Technology (TM)? When you Have The Technology, even primordial slime can be guided by the hand of convergent evolution into a ridiculous species with unbelievable resemblances to various other preexisting entities termed "human". At least we don't look too too different. (Those who have undergone ATF-aided transmogrification are not reliable means of comparison.)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jun 25, 2007 5:18 pm From what I understand, it's meant to be literal in the sense that Humanity IS the 18th Angel, but also symbolically since humans have no angelic "powers" and the like.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Jun 25, 2007 5:36 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: From what I understand, it's meant to be literal in the sense that Humanity IS the 18th Angel, but also symbolically since humans have no angelic "powers" and the like.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jul 07, 2007 1:26 pm to put it all in a sentence or two the Angels are just humans who rejected their human form and became big frickin' monters
summary:
[]: A couple angelic questions             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Jun 24, 2007 9:13 pm Just a few things I probably forgot the details behind or something; why do Angels' DNA match human's 99% or so? They both come from different seeds of life; why would they correlate? And why would Rei-Lilith have a type blue blood pattern, again?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDu
